title: Architect Symptom-Based Alerting
description: Design alerting rules based on Multi-Window Burn Rates of SLOs to prioritize user-facing impact. Eliminate alert fatigue by focusing on symptom-based alerts rather than low-level resource utilization. Configure paging systems to respond to critical, user-impacting reliability issues.
objectives: Design alerting rules based on Multi-Window Burn Rates of SLOs to prioritize user-facing impact.
Eliminate alert fatigue by focusing on symptom-based alerts rather than low-level resource utilization.
Configure paging systems to respond to critical, user-impacting reliability issues.
